  next: 2 Live keeps watching for new events

  next: 2 Live opens the event stream and marks current events seen

  next: 4 Memory opens inbox review; use edit/distill or skip for ambiguous candidates

  detail: candidate memory new count=untracked

• [OK] Sessions — no stale active sessions detected
  next: 5 Sessions lists handoff entry points

  next: 3 Doctor refreshes health checks and shows remediation hints
  detail: doctor: pass=2 warn=1 fail=1
  detail: hooks/mcp: warn=0 fail=1

• doctor: pass=2 warn=1 fail=1
• hooks/mcp: warn=0 fail=1
